brief_summary: Horizontal group-buy timeline. Coral filled marker at 2026-04-17 ('opens'), coral filled bar spanning the four-week window, second coral marker at 2026-05-17 ('closes'). Below the timeline, three feature chips name the editorial-story attributes: leaf-spring F1 mount, 9° typing angle, friction-fit cat ears in 4 colorways.
data_sources: cannonkeys-nyawice-group-buy.mdx § 'Buying notes' — 'The buy is global through CannonKeys, with one checkout and one fulfillment timeline. The window is 2026-04-17 through 2026-05-17 — a four-week buy'
